title: Autorquin – Quotation Automation
businessProblem: Creating and sending quotations by hand was taking too much time. Customer details had to be gathered manually, templates filled in, PDFs prepared, approvals managed, and follow-up emails sent, which slowed responses and made it harder to scale.
deliveredSolution: Built Autorquin on Google Workspace to collect customer information through forms, generate branded PDF quotations automatically, manage confirmations, send emails, and keep everything tracked in Google Sheets.
expectedBenefits: Faster quotation handling, less manual admin work, more consistent customer communication, and a smoother process as the business grows.
nextPhase: The next phase is moving toward an AI-assisted experience, where customers can request quotations through a conversational chat or voice interface and more of the workflow can be handled automatically end to end.
